intro.heading: Let's Build Something Together
intro.body: I help small businesses and startups bring their web ideas to life. From clean, minimal brochure sites to interactive landing pages, I focus on functional, mobile-responsive, and visually compelling web experiences that elevate your brand and engage your audience.

services.title: Custom Website Design
services.description: Minimalist, professional, brand-aligned layouts crafted to reflect your unique identity and convert visitors into customers.

services.title: Responsive & Accessible
services.description: Sites that work seamlessly across all devices — from desktop to mobile — and are inclusive for all users.

services.title: Lead Capture & Forms
services.description: Contact forms, newsletter sign-ups, and event registrations that connect you to your audience.

services.title: E-Commerce & Payments
services.description: Small storefronts, online bookings, and simple checkout flows integrated with Stripe, PayPal, or Shopify.

services.title: Content Management
services.description: Easy-to-update sites via headless CMS (Sanity, Contentful) so you stay in control of your content.

services.title: Analytics Ready
services.description: Google Analytics setup, basic conversion tracking, and insights to understand how your site performs.

portfolio.title: Artisanal Coffee Shop
portfolio.description: A mobile-friendly, scroll-based landing page showcasing a local coffee brand — rich imagery, clean layout, and a warm, inviting feel.

portfolio.title: Boutique Consulting Firm
portfolio.description: A multi-page professional site with interactive hover effects and a polished, credibility-focused design for a boutique B2B firm.

portfolio.title: Fictional Startup Product Page
portfolio.description: A storytelling-focused product page with bold CTAs, animated sections, and a modern startup aesthetic.

portfolio.title: Personal Portfolio Template
portfolio.description: A clean, mobile-first portfolio template demonstrating strong design sensibility, usability, and visual hierarchy.

cta.heading: Ready to Start Your Project?
cta.body: Interested in working together? Let's discuss your project — from concept to launch, I'll partner with you every step of the way.
